## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally; run `npm run ci` when you touch **`examples/nextjs-app`** or core size budget
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) (use `npm run commit` for the guided flow — see [COMMIT_CONVENTION.md](./.github/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md))
- [ ] If this changes user-visible behavior or public API of a **published** package: I ran `npm run changeset` and committed the `.changeset/*.md` file
- [ ] Docs updated if needed (`internal-docs/…`)
